things.name: City of Arts and Sciences
things.description: Santiago Calatrava's breathtaking futuristic complex with science museum, IMAX and oceanarium

things.name: Valencia Cathedral & Holy Grail
things.description: Gothic cathedral that allegedly houses the Holy Grail — climb the Miguelete bell tower for city views

things.name: Central Market (Mercado Central)
things.description: One of Europe's largest fresh food markets (1928) in a stunning Art Nouveau iron-and-tile building

things.name: Turia Gardens
things.description: 9-km linear park created in the dry bed of the River Turia — bike paths, sports and gardens

things.name: La Malvarrosa Beach
things.description: Valencia's main urban beach — wide sandy promenade with excellent paella restaurants nearby

things.name: Barrio del Carmen
things.description: Valencia's bohemian old town quarter with medieval walls, street art and the best tapas bars

things.name: Museum of Fine Arts Valencia
things.description: One of Spain's most important collections with Ribalta, Sorolla and European Old Masters

things.name: L'Albufera Natural Park
things.description: Stunning freshwater lagoon 10 km south — the birthplace of paella, with boat trips and rice fields

things.name: Silk Exchange (La Lonja)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 15th-century Gothic silk trading hall with a stunning spiral-column hall

things.name: IVAM Contemporary Art Museum
things.description: Spain's first dedicated contemporary art museum with a strong collection of avant-garde works
